backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no backend logic.
feature_evidence.json: Feature report mapping implemented features to files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: List of prewritten summaries for many frontend files in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base file defining a romantic color theme and global styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: App root that renders the RomanticSlidesExperience component.
frontend/src/components/game2d3d/Drawing: Interactive 2D drawing canvas that captures points and triggers shape conversion.
frontend/src/components/game2d3d/shapeTo: Utility converting 2D points into a normalized, extruded Three.js mesh.
frontend/src/components/game2d3d/ThreeDV: Three.js viewer that renders an extruded 3D mesh from drawn points.
frontend/src/components/romance/FinalGam: Slide combining the drawing pad and 3D viewer with navigation and reset controls.
frontend/src/components/romance/OpeningS: Full-screen romantic opening slide displaying the title and a continue button.
frontend/src/components/romance/Romantic: Displays a romantic text carousel with navigation and transitions to the game after the final slide.
Controls the flow between the opening slide, the romantic carousel, and the final game slide.
Defines the RomanticSlide type and provides an array of romantic text slides.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the user's Internet Identity, refetching dependent queries on identity change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context, handling login, logout, and stored identity restoration.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file indicating no backend query methods are used.
frontend/src/index.css: Configures global Tailwind styles and defines custom romantic-themed colors, animations, and utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes the React app, wrapping it with query and identity providers and loading global styles.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending colors, fonts, animations, and enabling plugins for the romantic theme.
project_state.json: Describes the project’s state, requirements, features, and pending feature requests for the romantic slideshow and mini‑game app.
